rationale: Educ. Code §7.023 governs agency employment non-discrimination policy. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A decision of the agency relating to employment shall be made without regard to a person's race, color, disability, sex, religion, age, or national origin.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict.
